testcase.name: verifyAddGroup

failure.message: Cannot inject @Test annotated Method [verifyAddGroup] with [class java.lang.String, class java.lang.String]. For more information on native dependency injection please refer to https://testng.org/#_dependency_injection

testcase.failure: org.testng.TestNGException: Cannot inject @Test annotated Method [verifyAddGroup] with [class java.lang.String, class java.lang.String].
